message:
chore(deps): update workspace dependencies and add scheduling support

Updates multiple dependencies to latest versions and adds new crates
for scheduled task execution and duration parsing.

New dependencies:
- humantime (2.1): Human-friendly duration parsing (e.g., "30s", "5m")
- tokio-cron-scheduler (0.15): Async cron-style task scheduling
- cron (0.15): Cron expression parsing for self-test schedules

Updated dependencies:
- object: 0.36 -> 0.38 (binary/object file parsing)
- toml: 0.8 -> 0.9 (configuration parsing)
- prometheus: 0.13 -> 0.14 (metrics collection)
- dialoguer: 0.11 -> 0.12 (interactive CLI prompts)
- console: 0.15 -> 0.16 (terminal styling)
- pulldown-cmark: 0.12 -> 0.13 (markdown rendering)
- crossterm: 0.28 -> 0.29 (TUI terminal handling)

Crate-specific changes:
- rch/Cargo.toml: Add humantime for duration parsing in config
- rchd/Cargo.toml: Add cron and scheduler for self-test automation

These updates enable:
- Human-readable duration configuration (e.g., retry_delay = "5s")
- Cron-based self-test scheduling (e.g., schedule = "0 0 * * *")
- Latest TUI and CLI prompt capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
